name: Smokey Brie Spread
recipeIngredient: 4 1/2 oz brie cheese, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the bacon in a food processor or blender and process until finely chopped.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to the processed bacon and blend until smooth.
3. Transfer the mixture to a container and refrigerate until ready to serve.
Yield: Approximately 1 1/2 cups
